sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51915" key="kaquperterhtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καθυπερτερ-ητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n51915.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prevalent, prepollent</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δύναμις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:102:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">102.14</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
